entries.entry: 13-step sales sequence v2 captured and saved — LinkedIn-first, 60-day approach with breakup paradox at Day 31 and resurrection at Day 60
Exa.ai enrichment tested on PACCAR — 3 API calls, free tier. Results: 34 active job postings, 10 IT leadership contacts, $1.2B capex budget, digital transformation signals
Julia's placement book analyzed — 77 placements across 40+ clients. Top accounts: PACCAR (12), tinyBuild (6), Frazier (6), UpTop (5), Accordant (4)
Mike provided full 13-step outreach sequence — LinkedIn connection → value drops → soft ask → reframe → social proof → email switch → insight bomb → phone call → breakup → resurrection
